Smart Play Pro+ infotainment makes driving immersive and entertaining. Stay tuned to Smart Play Pro+ with a 22.86 cm touchscreen display and Advanced Voice Assist. The New Age Baleno boasts of premium acoustic tuning experience with the “Surround Sense” powered by ARKAMYS, that gives it a signature ambiance created to suit your every mood. You can also wirelessly connect your smartphone with Android Auto® and Apple CarPlay® for a seamless wireless experience. Fortify your driving performance with an advanced 1.2 L K series Dual Jet Dual VVT engine with idle start-stop. Get started on a bold and sensorial driving experience with higher fuel efficiency. The NEXA Baleno comes with an advanced 1.2 L K series Dual Jet Dual VVT Engine. This engine is tuned for Indian driving conditions and has a maximum power of 66kW at 6000 rpm and a peak torque of 113Nm at 4400 rpm. It also has the Idle Start-Stop system, which automatically turns off the engine when the car is stopped to reduce fuel consumption and improve mileage. Enjoy superior performance and fuel efficiency with Baleno S-CNG it comes with a dual inter-dependent Electronic Control Units (ECU) and an intelligent injection system to provide an optimum air-fuel ratio. Integrated wire harnesses eliminate short-circuiting and ensure that your drive is safe. Fortify your driving performance with an advanced 1.2 L K series Dual Jet Dual VVT engine with idle start-stop. Get started on a bold and sensorial driving experience with higher fuel efficiency. The NEXA Baleno comes with an advanced 1.2 L K series Dual Jet Dual VVT Engine. This engine is tuned for Indian driving conditions and has a maximum power of 66kW at 6000 rpm and a peak torque of 113Nm at 4400 rpm. It also has the Idle Start-Stop system, which automatically turns off the engine when the car is stopped to reduce fuel consumption and improve mileage. For cancellation of orders which have already been invoiced or are in open status beyond 90 days, customers shall have to coordinate offline for cancellations and refund with the concerned Dealership or Distributor. There will be no booking cancellation charges if the customer cancels the booking. The online booking amount shall be refunded to the Customer through the same mode that is used for making the payment for booking. It takes approximately 25-30 days* for the amount to get refunded.
